title: Polka Dot Plates, Set of 2 (Green and Red)
description:
You get two plates here — one in apple green (verde mela) and one in ramino red (rosso ramino). Each plate has a white background with large freehand polka dots painted across the surface and a gently scalloped edge. The dots aren't perfectly round or evenly spaced, and that's the whole point. Our artisans in Vietri sul Mare paint every dot by brush, so each one has its own weight and texture.

The green plate has soft sage-green dots, while the red has warm rose-pink dots. Together on a table they look playful and fresh — the kind of thing that makes a simple lunch feel a bit more special. They're part of our Arcobaleno Collection, which plays with bold colours and simple geometric patterns.

These plates are fully food-safe, glazed with non-toxic enamels, and meant to be used. They work well for salads, pasta, antipasti, or as under-plates to add colour to a plain white set. They're also easy to mix with other patterns — polka dots go with almost everything.

Because each dot is painted by hand, the plates in your set will have slight variations in the size and shade of the dots compared to what you see in the photo. Available in various sizes.
excerpt: A pair of handpainted ceramic plates — one green, one red — with freehand polka dots and scalloped edges. Made in Vietri sul Mare.
seoTitle: Polka Dot Plates Set of 2 — Ceramiche Da Mario
